channel.title: 2d Game on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in 2d Game on RaihnForge

item.title: Castlevania 3 - Clock Tower Study
item.description: Nostalgia is not only a powerful source of motivation, but it incentives us to explore contemporary concepts from the past and carry forward that which stands the test of time.  In this vein I enjoy taking a break from my usual set of tasks in order to pay respects to the masters of the past, and to hopefully glean some bit of knowledge myself. This is one of my favorite Castlevania 3 stages, and one of my favorite games from my youth.  If I were to reimagine this scene once a year for the rest of my days I feel I would always discover some new bit of awesome, even if my lifespan was more akin to Dracula’s.

item.title: Daily UP 2011.10.26
item.description:
Goal:  Reset frame for hero and come up with some bad guys!

Daily UP vLog: 2011.10.27

Our new hero and old hero, unimpressed by the Borderlands Ogre.

Some good old Spartan inspired armor

NOTES Sprite: Starting with a basic image of a man I will push to create several armor sets from the initial pose.
